messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## Console

### Interactive Console

```bash
terraform console

# Test expressions
> 1 + 1
2
> "hello" == "hello"
true
> length(["a", "b", "c"])
3
```

### Useful Functions

```bash
> lookup({a = 1}, "a", 0)
1
> split(".", "10.0.0.1")
[
  "10",
  "0",
  "0",
  "1"
]
> format("vm-%s", "web")
"vm-web"
```

### Test Locals

```bash
> local.compartment_id
"ocid1.compartment.oc1..."
```

### Debug Expressions

- Test complex logic
- Validate functions
- Check variables
